attributes.description: Deep monitoring for Supabase services and APIs — Auth (GoTrue), PostgREST, Realtime, and Go runtime metrics.

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.auth_users_user_count` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.auth_users_user_count`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.auth_users_user_count` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.auth_users_user_count`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.global_auth_version_patch` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.global_auth_version_patch`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.global_auth_version_patch` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.global_auth_version_patch`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE global_auth_version_major IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, global_auth_version_major
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE global_auth_version_major IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, global_auth_version_major
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Auth Users Count` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.auth_users_user_count`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Auth Users Count` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.auth_users_user_count`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Restarts` = SUM(RATE(postgresql_restarts_total)) BY `Time Bucket` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time Bucket` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgreSQL Restarts` = SUM(RATE(postgresql_restarts_total)) BY `Time Bucket` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time Bucket` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_db_pool_available IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_db_pool_available
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_db_pool_available IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_db_pool_available
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `JWT Cache Hits` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total)), `JWT Cache Requests` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `JWT Cache Hits` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_jwt_cache_hits_total)), `JWT Cache Requests` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_jwt_cache_requests_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

attributes.title: PostgREST JWT Cache Hits vs Requests

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `DB Pool Available` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgrst_db_pool_available)), `DB Pool Timeouts Total` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `DB Pool Available` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(pgrst_db_pool_available)), `DB Pool Timeouts Total` = SUM(RATE(pgrst_db_pool_timeouts_total)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

attributes.title: PostgREST DB Pool: Available Connections & Timeouts

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgREST Schema Cache Loads` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pgrst_schema_cache_loads_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `PostgREST Schema Cache Loads` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.pgrst_schema_cache_loads_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Avg Schema Cache Query Time` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgrst_schema_cache_query_time_seconds`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Avg Schema Cache Query Time` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.pgrst_schema_cache_query_time_seconds`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Realtime Postgres Changes Subscriptions` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Realtime Postgres Changes Subscriptions` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.realtime_postgres_changes_total_subscriptions`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Supabase Direct Connection Count` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Supabase Direct Connection Count` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.direct_connection_stats_connection_count`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE go_memstats_alloc_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, go_memstats_alloc_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE go_memstats_alloc_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, go_memstats_alloc_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_resident_memory_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_resident_memory_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE process_runtime_go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_runtime_go_goroutines
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE process_runtime_go_goroutines IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_runtime_go_goroutines
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_max_fds
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, process_max_fds
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Alloc Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_alloc_bytes)), `Sys Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_sys_bytes)), `Heap Objects` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_objects)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Alloc Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_alloc_bytes)), `Sys Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_sys_bytes)), `Heap Objects` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_objects)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Go Goroutines` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_runtime_go_goroutines)), `Go Memstats Lookups Total` = SUM(RATE(go_memstats_lookups_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Go Goroutines` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_runtime_go_goroutines)), `Go Memstats Lookups Total` = SUM(RATE(go_memstats_lookups_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `GC Pause Total (ns)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.process_runtime_go_gc_pause_total_ns_total`)), `GC Count Total` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.process_runtime_go_gc_count_total`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `GC Pause Total (ns)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.process_runtime_go_gc_pause_total_ns_total`)), `GC Count Total` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.process_runtime_go_gc_count_total`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Virtual Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_virtual_memory_bytes)), `Resident Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Virtual Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_virtual_memory_bytes)), `Resident Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(process_resident_memory_bytes)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT `Time` ASC
